Establish the whole region. One area, not yet partitioned.
Partition the region into parts of different areas. There is no unit fraction because the parts are unequal.
Shade some parts. Because the parts have different areas, the shaded amount is not the intended fraction.

Partition the region into equal parts, but make the wrong number: count the cuts, not the regions.
